##RRUFFID=R130021
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Na_1.5_Bi_0.5_)Ta_2_O_6_F
##LOCALITY=Fisher’s Ledge, Topsham, Maine, USA.
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Royal Ontario Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Transparent green octahedra on albite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_1.01_Ca_0.94_Bi_0.02_Mn_0.01_)(Ta_1.96_Nb_0.02_Sb_0.01_Sn_0.01_)O_6_[F_0.85_(OH)_0.11_]

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
